name: gpt-4.1
description: OpenAI's Flagship GPT model for complex tasks.

frequency_penalty.description: Frequency penalty parameter - positive values penalize the repetition of tokens.
frequency_penalty.title: Frequency Penalty

image_input.description: List of images to send to the model
image_input.title: Image Input

max_completion_tokens.description: Maximum number of completion tokens to generate
max_completion_tokens.title: Max Completion Tokens

messages.description: A JSON string representing a list of messages. For example: [{"role": "user", "content": "Hello, how are you?"}]. If provided, prompt and system_prompt are ignored.
messages.title: Messages

presence_penalty.description: Presence penalty parameter - positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics.
presence_penalty.title: Presence Penalty

prompt.description: The prompt to send to the model. Do not use if using messages.
prompt.title: Prompt

system_prompt.description: System prompt to set the assistant's behavior
system_prompt.title: System Prompt

top_p.description: Nucleus sampling parameter - the model considers the results of the tokens with top_p probability mass. (0.1 means only the tokens comprising the top 10% probability mass are considered.)
top_p.title: Top P
